UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1, 2 AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT HE PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION EXISTS UNDER HAMP OR CONSENT DECREE. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE ONLY TO ALLEGE LEGAL DUTY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE A DUTY, ITS BREACH, CAUSATION AND DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shaudee Navid Esq., of Reed Smith (415-659-5674) for Bank of America N.A., Moving Party and Defendant.
Michael Rooney Esq.,(415-533-0282) for Alcides Valladares Perla, Plaintiff and Opposing Party.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling with the following modifications: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to Plaintiff's cause of action for negligence. Plaintiff fails to allege a duty, its breach, causation and damages. Plaintiff's request for leave to amend is granted as follows: Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to amend the complaint to allege in good faith a cause of action for promissory estoppel. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Continued To Oct-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to October 24, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 4, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk:M. Goodman, Not reported, (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Shaudee Navid of Reed Smith LLP (415-659-5674) appear for defendant Bank of America, N.A. moving party.
Atty. Michael Rooney Law Offices of Michael Rooney (415-533-0282) (counsel not attorney on record) for plaintiff Alcides Valladare Perla opposing party.

Argued - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to 1, 2 and 3rd causes of action. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that he private right of action exists under HAMP or Consent Decree. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to 4th cause of action for negligence only to allege legal duty. Order signed in open court. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendants' Amended Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint is sastained with leave to amend and address issue raised in demurrer. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
